instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `ensure-integer` that evaluates an expression once; if the value is an integer return it, otherwise signal an error mentioning the offending value.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (READ)))
            (IF (INTEGERP #:G1)
                #:G1
                (ERROR "Not an integer: ~A" #:G1)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (READ)))
            (IF (INTEGERP #:G112)
                #:G112
                (ERROR "Not an integer: ~A" #:G112)))

--- stderr ---
